name: search-src
description: Grep for a pattern across source files, excluding non-source directories like node_modules and target. Supports --files-only and --head=N.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.description: File extension filter (e.g. go, ts, rs).

parameters.name: --files-only
parameters.description: List filenames only instead of matching lines.

cost_saving_rationale: Avoids grep --include failures on busybox, excludes non-source dirs, and limits output to reduce token cost.
